summary: Frontend smoke test of MV Rudraksh (React + Supabase). Home, Shop, Product Detail, Categories, Journal, Static pages, Search, 404, and Admin (login + all 7 admin routes) all load and render seeded data correctly. Admin auth via Supabase works with provided credentials.
passed: Home categories bento (cat-* tiles) render (4 categories)
Home product cards (product-card-*) render featured products
Shop page loads 6 products + 4 category filters + sort-select (verified after ~4s load)
Product Detail page: whatsapp-inquiry + copy-upi testids present
Categories page renders tile links to /shop?category=<slug>
Journal list renders 3 blog posts (visible in screenshot)
Contact page exposes contact-form + contact-submit testids
Admin login (admin@mvrudraksh.com / MvRudraksh@2026) succeeds and redirects to /admin
Admin dashboard shows stat cards (6 products, 4 categories, 3 journal, 4 testimonials, 4 featured, 0 out-of-stock, 0 inquiries)
Supabase REST verified directly (products+categories join, blog_posts, categories all HTTP 200)

failed.issue: Many Supabase requests are logged as net::ERR_ABORTED on initial load (products with categories join, categories, site_settings repeated 10+ times). On first render Shop/Journal briefly appear empty; content only appears after ~2-4s once the retried fetch completes. Likely React 18 StrictMode double-mount aborting supabase-js fetches and/or SiteProvider effect running repeatedly.
failed.evidence: Console log shows repeated 'REQUEST FAILED: .../rest/v1/site_settings?select=* - net::ERR_ABORTED' and one abort of the products+categories join query. Direct curl to Supabase returns HTTP 200 with correct data.

failed.issue: Journal list page (/journal) cards do not have data-testid='blog-card-<slug>'. Only Home.jsx applies that testid. Content.jsx Journal list should mirror it for consistent testability.
failed.evidence: Playwright locator '[data-testid^=blog-card-]' count=0 on /journal, but screenshot clearly shows 3 posts rendered.

action_items: Optional: guard SiteProvider useEffect to run once (or memoize) to stop repeated site_settings fetches
Optional: add data-testid='blog-card-<slug>' to the Journal list cards in /app/frontend/src/pages/Content.jsx for parity with Home
No blocking bugs — main agent can proceed to first finish
